default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Regroup between GrowthX and Smith.ai to discuss potential SEO and content strategy partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX showcased their AI-first approach to content strategy, highlighting success with Steadily (5x traffic growth in 8-10 months)](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Smith.ai aims to focus on AI/voice assistant (VA) content, prioritizing high-conversion topics over broad programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [GrowthX to send SOW for Feb 3rd kickoff, including both editorial and programmatic content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Smith.ai team eager to start quickly, open to accelerating process by completing pre-kickoff questionnaires](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI-First Content Strategy Showcase

  - [Presented Steadily case study: 5x traffic growth (20k to 80-100k monthly visitors) in 8-10 months](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Approach combines AI-generated content, editorial oversight, and programmatic elements](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Focus on high-intent topics and mass-market content to boost domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Strategy led to significant cost savings: Steadily now spending $0 on paid ads, down from 6-figures monthly](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

### Smith.ai's Content Goals and Priorities

  - [Focus on AI/voice assistant (VA) product content](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Aim for high-conversion topics, skeptical about broad programmatic content (e.g., area codes)](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Open to refreshing existing content (600-700 pages) alongside new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Desire for meaningful lift in Q2, emphasizing quick start and establishing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)

### GrowthX's Process and Tools

  - [Demonstrated competitor analysis, persona development, and jobs-to-be-done frameworks](https://fathom.video/share/rcxu7bPdgpRfoXxq9ussuZ-kzQsgK6QV?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
